name: Bombardier Q400 NextGen
tagline: 22 ATA-organised systems with chapter-by-chapter lessons, flashcards, quizzes, and progress tracking.
description: The Bombardier Q400 (DHC-8-400) is a 78–90 seat twin-turboprop regional airliner produced from 1999. The Q400 module is the flagship of the AviatorTutor self-study library — full ATA chapter coverage from Air Conditioning & Pressurization through Avionics, Powerplant, Hydraulics, Electrical, Landing Gear, Flight Controls, Fuel, and beyond. Flashcards drive long-term retention; quizzes mirror sim and recurrent-training question patterns.

name: Boeing 737 (NG / MAX)
tagline: The world's most-flown narrowbody. Systems, FMC, performance, abnormal/emergency drills.
description: Coverage planned for the Boeing 737-700/-800/-900 (Next Generation) and 737 MAX 8/9 variants. Air Systems, Hydraulic Power, Electrical, Flight Controls, FMC and CDU operations, Auto Flight, Fuel, Engines (CFM56-7 and LEAP-1B), Landing Gear, Anti-ice, and more.

name: Boeing 757
tagline: Pilot-favourite long-range narrowbody. Systems, performance, ETOPS-relevant procedures.
description: Coverage planned for the Boeing 757-200 and 757-300. EICAS, hydraulic system, electrical, fuel, engines (RB211 and PW2000 variants), pneumatics, anti-ice, auto-flight, FMS.

name: Boeing 777 (200 / 300 / ER)
tagline: Long-haul widebody. FBW, EICAS, ETOPS-180/240/330, autoland.
description: Coverage planned for the Boeing 777-200ER, -300ER, and 777F. Fly-by-wire flight control law, EICAS, autoland, ETOPS, hydraulics (4-system architecture), electrical, fuel (centre + main + reserve), engines (GE90, PW4000, Trent 800), and the comprehensive FMS.

name: Boeing 787 Dreamliner
tagline: All-electric architecture, no-bleed engines, composite airframe.
description: Coverage planned for the Boeing 787-8/-9/-10. The all-electric architecture (no engine bleed), high-voltage electrical buses, ECS, fly-by-wire, FMS, and the differences from earlier Boeing widebodies.

name: Airbus A320 family
tagline: FBW with flight control laws, ECAM, MCDU. The narrowbody other half.
description: Coverage planned for the Airbus A318/A319/A320/A321 (CEO and NEO). Flight control laws (Normal/Alternate/Direct), ECAM, MCDU, hydraulic Y/G/B systems, electrical, fuel, engines (CFM56-5B and LEAP-1A, V2500 and PW1100G), and the philosophy of Airbus FBW.

name: Airbus A330
tagline: Twin-engine widebody. Long-haul ETOPS, ECAM-driven philosophy.
description: Coverage planned for the A330-200/-300 and A330neo. ECAM, FMS, FBW laws, hydraulic G/B/Y systems with PTU, electrical, fuel (trim tank, centre, mains), engines (CF6-80E1, PW4000, Trent 700, Trent 7000).

name: Bombardier CRJ-700
tagline: 70-seat regional jet. ProLine 4 avionics, CF34-8 engines.
description: Coverage planned for the CRJ-700 (and -550 derivative). ProLine 4 avionics suite, hydraulics, electrical, fuel, CF34-8C5 engines, anti-ice, flight controls.

name: Bombardier CRJ-900
tagline: 76-90 seat regional jet. Heavy regional workhorse.
description: Coverage planned for the CRJ-900/-1000. Same ProLine 4 family, longer fuselage, NACA inlet.

name: Embraer 190 / 195
tagline: Latin America's dominant regional. E-Jet philosophy, FBW spoilers.
description: Coverage planned for the E170/E175/E190/E195 first-generation E-Jets. Honeywell Primus Epic avionics, hydraulics, electrical, FBW for spoilers/rudder, CF34-10E engines.

name: Cessna 208 Caravan
tagline: Single-pilot turboprop. Cargo and passenger workhorse for the GA market.
description: Coverage planned for the Cessna Caravan / Grand Caravan / EX. PT6A-114 / -140 engines, fuel system, electrical, ice protection, flight controls, and single-pilot operations.

name: Cessna 172 Skyhawk
tagline: The world's most-built aircraft. Where every pilot learns.
description: Coverage planned for the Cessna 172 Skyhawk (G1000 variants). Lycoming O-320/O-360, fuel, electrical, basic flight controls, and the underlying principles every PPL student must master.
